info.name: Sendbird Platform API
info.description:
The Sendbird Platform API provides server-side access to manage users, channels, messages, and moderation for in-app chat applications built on Sendbird. Supports group channels, open channels, direct messages, push notifications, and webhooks for real-time communication features.

Contact Support:
 Name: Sendbird Support

item.name: Ban a User from a Channel

request.description: Bans a user from a specific channel for moderation purposes.

Maximum number of users to return (1-100).
Filter by user active mode.
Whether to include bot users in results.
